title: Vanilla Max 512x
body:
# The ONLY 512x Texturepack On Modrinth!

This pack is still in the works. Support the project on [Patreon!](https://www.patreon.com/c/CapTommy?view_as=patron) To get early access to updates! There are still a lot of textures yet to be made, here is the current list:
- Grass Blocks
- Stone Blocks
- Cobblestone
- Crafting Table
- Dirt
- Dirt Path

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a0c6b231e8f971444ba19daea523d3088c36be.png)

**Updates May Take A While**
